top_candidates.reasoning: The engineering layer's META structural signature — 'Krishna stops arguing a position and instead names the architecture of his own teaching,' the explicit naming of TWO distinct disciplines (architectural reading + shipping discipline), the verse's positioning as the structural hinge that authorizes the chapter thesis's three-thread reading, and the closing promise about karma-bandham (rendered as 'work no longer collapses into one substrate where neither discipline is fully practiced') — uniquely matches eṣā te 'bhihitā sāṅkhye buddhir yoge tv imāṁ śṛṇu + buddhyā yukto yayā pārtha karma-bandhaṁ prahāsyasi. The 'tu' pivot is the META naming-act and is the 2.39 signature. 3.3 restates; 5.2 compares; 2.39 NAMES.
Doctrinal cousin (two-niṣṭhā distinction in mature form) but no META naming-act.
Doctrinal cousin (comparative valuation) but no META naming-act.
